TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Davugele Davugele u sulit nu Hulam: u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taitung a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Davugele. u kasalumaluma' nu Davugele sa, 109 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 252 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 198 ku tademaw, pakalatu 79%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 54 ku tademaw, pakalatu 21%. u kasabinacadan, ŤąáťáĎŚīôťÉ®ŤźĹś∑∑ŚĪÖ. macamul mueneng tu Kinlun niyazu'. u Paywan (Paiwan) a niyazu' u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Paywan a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw i Taitung a kuwan, caay katuud ku Sakizaya. inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. izaw tu hakya, caayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu cidekay. inayay ku cacudadan i Davugele niyazu'. inayay ku kyukay i Davugele niyazu'. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)
S.PHON: da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i taituŇč a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, *******. ma ¶amur~…ĺ mu…ôn…ôŇč tu kinr~…ĺun nijazu Ē~ °. u pajwan (paiwan) a nijazu Ē~ ° u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw i taituŇč a kuwan, ¶aaj katuud ku sakizaja. inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. izaw tu ńßakja, ¶aajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶id…ôkaj. inajaj ku ¶a ¶udadan i da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku kjukaj i da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô nijazu Ē~ °. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: Davugele Davugele u sulit nu Hulam: u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taitung a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Davugele. u kasalumaluma' nu Davugele sa, 109 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 252 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 198 ku tademaw, pakalatu 79%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 54 ku tademaw, pakalatu 21%. u kasabinacadan, ŤąáťáĎŚīôťÉ®ŤźĹś∑∑ŚĪÖ. macamul mueneng tu Kinlun niyazu'. u Paywan (Paiwan) a niyazu' u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Paywan a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw i Taitung a kuwan, caay katuud ku Sakizaya. inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. izaw tu hakya, caayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu cidekay. inayay ku cacudadan i Davugele niyazu'. inayay ku kyukay i Davugele niyazu'. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)
S.PHON: da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i taituŇč a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, *******. ma ¶amur~…ĺ mu…ôn…ôŇč tu kinr~…ĺun nijazu Ē~ °. u pajwan (paiwan) a nijazu Ē~ ° u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw i taituŇč a kuwan, ¶aaj katuud ku sakizaja. inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. izaw tu ńßakja, ¶aajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶id…ôkaj. inajaj ku ¶a ¶udadan i da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô nijazu Ē~ °. inajaj ku kjukaj i da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô nijazu Ē~ °. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
